disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe burning/electric pain preceded the rash by ~3 days, in a one-sided band
trigger_question_examples: Did a severe burning/electric pain come first, before any rash, on one side only?
Is the pain in a band on one side?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — the burning electric pain came first for three days, all on the right side in a band, then the blisters.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Grouped blisters in a strictly unilateral band stopping at the midline (dermatomal)
trigger_question_examples: Does the rash stay on one side and stop exactly at the middle of your chest?
Are they grouped blisters in a band?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, it's grouped blisters in a band on the right that stops right at the midline — nothing on the left.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Screen for cardiac/respiratory features: exertional/crushing chest pain, true breathlessness, sweating, radiation to arm/jaw
trigger_question_examples: Is the pain crushing/tight or brought on by exertion, with sweating or spread to the arm/jaw, or true breathlessness?
Does the pain change with breathing or is it just the skin that's tender?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a burning skin pain, not crushing or brought on by exertion; no arm/jaw spread, no cold sweats, and I'm not truly breathless — just shallow because it hurts.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: It just hurts a lot on that side.
